brand.studentsJoinFromPage: Students can join from the join page
brand.sidePanelTitle: Build a form. Share a code. Watch the class write.
brand.sidePanelBullet1: No accounts for students — just a 6-character code.
brand.sidePanelBullet3: Live feedback the moment you type it.

cookieConsent.title: Cookies on TruePaper
cookieConsent.description: We use essential cookies to sign you in and remember your language. You can accept or reject optional analytics and marketing cookies.
cookieConsent.prefsDescription: Choose which optional cookies we may use. Essential cookies are always required for the site to work.
cookieConsent.categoryAnalyticsDesc: Help us understand how the product is used (not loaded today unless you opt in).
cookieConsent.categoryMarketingDesc: Advertising and campaign measurement (not used today).

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to manage your forms and live sessions.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Students don't need accounts — this is for teachers who build forms.
register.passwordsDoNotMatch: Password and confirm password do not match.
register.confirmMustMatch: Must match the password above exactly.
register.confirmMeetRequirements: Meet all password requirements above first, then match that password.
register.checkEmail: Check your email to confirm your account, then log in.
register.needsEmailConfirmation: Check your email to confirm your account, then log in.
register.consentRequired: You must agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

dashboard.welcomeSubtitle: Run live sessions, build forms, and watch students answer in real time.

tier.needsWork: Nice try — review the feedback below.

landing.headline: Grade while they write — with one code.
landing.subheadline: Run a live exam in minutes. Students join on their devices, you watch every answer take shape, and leave feedback before they hand it in.
landing.ctaFinePrint: Free to start · No credit card
landing.studentLink: Have a session code? Join as a student
landing.proofStat: Built for K–12 and university classrooms
landing.proofQuote: I caught three misconceptions before the bell — without collecting papers.
landing.trustDevices: Works on any phone or laptop
landing.trustPrivacy: Students join with a first name only
landing.trustNoPaste: Copy and paste blocked during exams
landing.howItWorksStep1Body: Start a session. Your class joins from their browser — no app installs.
landing.howItWorksStep2Body: See every answer appear live on your roster. Students can only type — copy and paste are blocked.
landing.howItWorksStep3Body: Leave feedback while they work, then score submissions in one place.
landing.footerCtaSub: Set up your first live exam in minutes.

captions.join: The class joins with one code.
captions.write: Watch every answer as it's written.
captions.grade: Submit and grade in one place.

stage.questionPrompt: In one sentence, what powers photosynthesis?
stage.feedbackText: Great start — name the pigment too.

join.title: Join a live session
join.rejoinSummary: Already started? Use your personal rejoin code
join.rejoinHint: Eight characters from when you joined — not the class code.

teacher.previewSubtitle: See how students will experience this exam.
teacher.builderSubtitle: Build forms and start live sessions. Students join with a code.
teacher.noFormOpenHintEnd: on a form to open it here.

builder.liveFeedbackDesc: While students answer text questions, you can type comments on their live view that appear under their text box in real time.

exam.previewDesc: Try the exam as a student. Answers here are not saved.
exam.noQuestions: This form has no questions yet.

overlay.grading: Your teacher is grading your exam.
overlay.gradingHint: Your answers are saved. You can keep this tab open — your score will appear here when grading is done.
overlay.pausedHint: Keep this tab visible. Your teacher will let you back in.

submitted.title: Exam submitted
submitted.message: Your answers have been saved. Your teacher will review them when the session ends.
submitted.closeHint: You can close this tab or go to another page — nothing else is needed from you.

authNotice.linkExpired: That email link is invalid or has expired. Request a new confirmation email from the Supabase dashboard (Authentication → Users) or sign up again.
authNotice.generic: Something went wrong with email confirmation.

status.sessionCodeLoaded: Session code loaded. Enter your name, then tap Start task.
status.paused: This exam is paused until your teacher allows you to continue.
status.resumed: Your teacher allowed you to continue. You can answer again.
status.tabHiddenPaused: The exam was paused because this page was hidden. Wait for your teacher to let you continue.
status.screenCapturePaused: The exam was paused because screen capture was attempted. Wait for your teacher to let you continue.
status.screenCaptureBlocked: Screen capture is not allowed during the exam.
status.screenshotShortcut: Screenshot shortcuts are discouraged during the exam. Your work is watermarked.
status.inLiveSession: You are in the live session.
status.alreadySubmitted: You have already submitted this exam and cannot rejoin.

errors.submitTimeout: Submitting timed out. Check your connection and tap Submit again.

validation.joinCode: Enter the 6-character code (letters and numbers, no I/O/U/0/1).
validation.displayName: Enter your name (1–120 characters) before starting the exam.

hint.teacherStudentJoin: Enter your name and join with a session code to try the exam as a student.

session.liveOpenNoLimit: Live session open · No time limit
session.openClassDisplay: Open class display for projector (new tab)
session.downloadAllPdfTitle: Download a single PDF with every student's exam, feedback, and score
session.downloadStudentPdfTitle: Download this student's exam, feedback, and score as a PDF
session.downloadStudentPdfTitleShort: Download this student's exam as PDF

roster.title: Students in this session
roster.description: Status and activity for each student device in this live session. The list refreshes automatically.
roster.statusHelp: **Idle** means no pointer activity on the exam page. **Typing** shows briefly after keyboard or pointer activity. Other badges reflect blocked, submitted, or graded states. Graded rows show total points earned.
roster.emptyNeedsGrading: Nothing to grade. Submissions awaiting grading will appear here.
roster.emptyNeedsGradingAlt: Nothing to grade right now. Submissions awaiting grading will appear here.
roster.answerHandRaise: Student needs help — open their exam

errors.saveFeedback: Could not save feedback to student.

examList.title: Student exams
examList.subtitle: {formTitle} · Code {joinCode}
examList.description: Every student device in this session. Click a row to open that exam. The list refreshes automatically while the session is open.

watch.sessionClosedCopy: This session window is closed. Showing the last saved copy.
watch.streamLive: Answers update live when the student saves or changes their response.
watch.streamOffline: Live updates disconnected. Use Refresh or reload the page.
watch.notJoined: Student hasn't opened the exam yet.
watch.liveSync: Live — answers and feedback sync as you both type.
watch.markGradedTitle: Mark this exam as fully graded
watch.markGradedDisabledTitle: Enter points for every question to enable
watch.noQuestions: This form has no questions yet.
watch.feedbackPlaceholder: Comment appears under the student's answer…

liveDisplay.engagementNone: No students have joined this session yet.
liveDisplay.engagementActive: {inProgress} of {assigned} students are actively working on the exam right now (others may be idle, paused for leaving the tab, or finished).
liveDisplay.errorInvalidCode: This link does not contain a valid join code.
liveDisplay.errorNotOpen: This session is not open or could not be loaded.
liveDisplay.errorHint: This page only works while the session window is open. Ask your teacher for an updated link or code.
liveDisplay.ended: This session has ended or is not open yet.
liveDisplay.footer: For display in the classroom only. Question text and answers are not shown here.

review.headerGrading: Your teacher is grading your exam.

templateLibrary.title: Template library
templateLibrary.subtitle: Save, browse, and remix forms, questions, and sessions across your department.
templateLibrary.offlineCache: Showing cached templates — connect to refresh.

save.title: Save as template
save.name: Template name
save.joinDeptHint: Set your school and department in the template library to share with colleagues.

source.form: Saving this form and all its questions.
source.question: Saving this question as a reusable template.
source.session: Saving this session's form, questions, and timing defaults.

formLibrary.empty: No forms yet. Create one to get started.
formLibrary.deliveryLiveTooltip: Students can only answer while the session is open. Best for in-class exams.
formLibrary.deliverySelfPacedTooltip: Students can keep working offline and sync their answers when they're back online.
formLibrary.deliveryHybridTooltip: Students can answer during the live session or continue working offline afterward.
formLibrary.acceptLateSync: Accept late sync after session closes

startLink.hint: Opens this form and starts a live session with the settings above

errors.failed: Could not start the session from this link.

errors.invalidJson: That file isn't valid JSON. Make sure you saved the AI's reply as a .json file.

dashboard.deliveryMode: How students can answer. Live: only during the session window. Self-paced: they can keep working offline and sync later. Hybrid: both.
dashboard.sessionDuration: How long the session stays open after you start it. Students can't submit once the window closes.
dashboard.noTimeLimit: Leave the session open with no automatic close time. You end it manually when everyone's done.
dashboard.importExam: Upload an exam generated by ChatGPT or Claude. It becomes an editable form here.
dashboard.aiGuide: Download a guide that teaches an AI how to write an importable exam from your material.
dashboard.toGrade: Submitted answers waiting on manual marks. Auto-graded questions are already scored.
dashboard.joinCode: Students enter this 6-character code to join. Share the link or project it for the class.
dashboard.startLink: Copy a bookmarkable link that opens this form and starts a live session with the duration and delivery settings you've chosen.
dashboard.sessionSettings: Duration, no time limit, delivery mode, and late sync apply when you start or copy the quick-start link.
dashboard.acceptLateSync: When on, students can sync answers or submit after the session window closes. Turn off for strict in-class deadlines.

builder.questionType: Pick a question type. Multiple choice, true/false and short answer are auto-graded; written and visual types are marked by you.
builder.points: Marks awarded for this question. The total updates automatically as you add questions.
builder.correctAnswer: The option that's marked correct. Set this so the question scores itself the moment a student submits.
builder.acceptedAnswers: Answers counted as correct. Add common variants and spellings; you can make matching case-insensitive.
builder.liveFeedback: When on, you can leave comments students see while they're still writing during a live session.
builder.responseConfig: Settings specific to this question type — passage text, parts, items, axis ranges, and so on.

roster.presence: Live status from each student's device: typing now, idle, or offline.
roster.syncBadge: Answers saved on the student's device but not yet synced to the server. They'll upload when the connection returns.
roster.suspended: This student's exam is paused — usually after leaving the tab. Resume it to let them continue.
roster.handRaise: This student raised their hand to ask for help.

session.resumeCode: A one-time code that re-links a student to this exam if they lose their device or browser data.
session.stop: End the session now and submit every student's current answers. This can't be undone.

watch.liveFeedback: Type a comment the student sees in real time, before they submit.
watch.grade: Set or override the marks for this answer. Overrides replace the auto-graded score.
watch.markGraded: Mark this student's exam as fully graded so it moves out of your to-grade queue.
watch.reviewLink: Create a private link that lets this student review their graded answers and your feedback.

welcome.title: Welcome to Truepaper
welcome.body: This is your dashboard. Here's a 30-second tour of how to run your first live exam.

running.title: Live sessions
running.body: Sessions you're currently running show up here, with each student's progress in real time.

library.title: Your form library
library.body: Build and store your exams here. Each form can be started as a live session whenever you like.

createForm.title: Create your first form
createForm.body: Start from scratch and add questions of any type — multiple choice, written, diagrams, and more.

importForm.title: Or let AI draft it
importForm.body: Download the AI guide, give it to ChatGPT or Claude with your material, then import the result here to edit.

title.title: Name your exam
title.body: Give the form a title and an optional description. Everything autosaves as you work.

liveFeedback.title: Live feedback
liveFeedback.body: Turn this on to leave comments students can see while they're still writing.

addQuestion.title: Add questions
addQuestion.body: Pick a question type to add it. Multiple choice, true/false and short answer are auto-graded for you.

scoring.title: Set the marks
scoring.body: Choose how many points each question is worth. The totals roll up automatically.

answerKey.title: Answer key
answerKey.body: For auto-graded types, set the correct answer here so scores appear the moment students submit.

save.title: You're set
save.body: Your form saves automatically. Head back to your library to start it as a live session.

runningSessions.title: Running sessions
runningSessions.empty: No sessions are open. Start one from your form library below.

join.qrHint: Scan to join on a phone

rejoin.instructions: Give this to the student if they lost their browser. They enter it on the join page under "Lost your exam?"

feedback.title: Teacher feedback
feedback.placeholder: Your teacher can leave comments here as you work. Check back in a moment.

graph.label: Graph
graph.pointHint: Click on the grid to place a point.
graph.lineHintFirst: Click a point, then click another to connect them.
graph.lineHintSecond: Now click a second point to draw the line.
graph.labelHint: Click on the grid to place a label, or click an existing label to edit it.

photoHandwritten.label: Photo handwritten work
photoHandwritten.empty: Upload a photo of your handwritten work.
photoHandwritten.uploadError: Could not process that image. Try another photo.

status.offline: Saved locally — will sync when back online
status.submitQueued: Submit queued — will send when back online

offline.submitQueued: Your exam is queued to submit. Keep this tab open or come back when you're online — we'll send it automatically.
offline.airAlertPaused: Session paused for safety. Your answers are saved — continue when the alert ends.
offline.idbCleared: Local save storage was cleared. Your progress may not restore after refresh.
